name: Gale Reef Getaway
description: A relaxing reef experience featuring guided snorkeling, beach time, and an optional sunset cruise.

name: Dawson’s Reef Adventure
description: An action-packed trip visiting multiple reef sites with equipment rental included and optional kayaking.

name: Claire’s Reef Escape
description: A laid-back resort getaway with morning reef tours, a seafood buffet evening, and optional spa services.
